---
title: "Resume & Contact"
format: html
---

# Your Name

**Data Scientist • Machine Learning • Visualization**

- Email: bence.por03@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bence-por
- GitHub: https://github.com/bencepor

## Summary

I like machine learning and working with audio data, music analysis

## Skills

- Python, pandas, scikit-learn, PyTorch
- Data visualization: plotly, matplotlib, seaborn
- SQL

## Experience / Projects

- Internship at LiveVoice (Vienna based startup)
- Other school projects on my github, mostly related to math and audio

## Contact / Hire Me

If you'd like to reach me directly, send an email or use the form below:

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/mqegdbgp" method="POST">
  <label for="name">Name</label><br>
  <input type="text" id="name" name="name" required><br>
  <label for="email">Email</label><br>
  <input type="email" id="email" name="email" required><br>
  <label for="message">Message</label><br>
  <textarea id="message" name="message" rows="4" required></textarea><br>
  <button type="submit">Send</button>
</form>
